description: External tools required for building bin-infra (LIEF library)

notes: Required for building LIEF from source
On GitHub Actions: Pre-installed on all runners
Local development: Install via brew (macOS) or package manager (Linux)
Used by CMake as the build backend for LIEF
Provides faster parallel builds compared to Make
Required by LIEF's CMake build scripts
LIEF tracked via git submodule at packages/lief-builder/upstream/lief
Built from source or downloaded as prebuilt binary from socket-btm releases
LZFSE tracked via git submodule at packages/lief-builder/upstream/lzfse
On macOS: Uses native Apple Compression framework
On Linux/Windows: Built automatically from submodule
